text: The hazy light and sterile architecture evoke a sense of alienation within me. The blue glow draws me inward, but I remain at a distance—an observer behind glass. As I step closer and read the text on the vivid wall, I feel a resonance with its confession of awkwardness and longing for understanding. Here, in this showcase of innovation and research, I find myself caught between curiosity and vulnerability, wondering about the difference between how I intend to be seen and how I am actually perceived. There is a quiet hope for connection amid this modern spectacle.
